Residential Projects

Residential Roofing Across Houston

Shingle, tile, metal — insurance claims and cash jobs. Every roof treated like it's our own home.

FEATURED PROJECT — COMPLETED

Full Residential Tear-Off & Replacement — Houston, TX

Architectural Shingles  ·  Deck Repair Documented  ·  Ridge Vent  ·  3-Day Completion

① DECK DAMAGE DOCUMENTED
② UNDERLAYMENT FULLY LAID
③ RIDGE VENT + PIPE BOOTS
④ JOB COMPLETE

Project Scope

Full tear-off of existing shingle system. Rotted OSB decking sections found and replaced — a supplemental line item documented with photos and billed to insurance. New Roofnado AnchorDeck synthetic underlayment installed across entire deck. Full architectural shingle replacement with new ridge vent, pipe boots, and chimney counter-flashing. Job completed in 3 days.

Why This Matters for Your Claim

The deck damage found during tear-off is a supplemental line item most contractors miss — or don't know how to bill. Meza documents every discovered defect with photos same day and files it with the adjuster before closing the claim. That's money most homeowners leave on the table when they hire someone else.

Insurance Claim
Houston Heights, TX

Full Asphalt Shingle Replacement

State Farm initial denial overturned. NOAA hail data used to verify storm date. Full replacement approved on second filing.

Commercial Projects

Built for Scale. Delivered on Time.

From single-family homes to 25,000+ sq ft commercial roofs — we bring the same discipline and precision to every job.

FEATURED PROJECT — IN PROGRESS

25,000 Sq Ft Commercial TPO Roof Replacement — Houston, TX

Full Tear-Off  ·  TPO Membrane System  ·  Polyiso Insulation  ·  7-Day Completion

25,000
Square feet replaced
7
Days to complete
4+
Crew members on site
0
Days of business downtime
① BEFORE — FAILING ROOF
② DURING — INSULATION BOARDS
③ COMPLETION — TPO MEMBRANE DOWN

Full removal of existing modified bitumen system. New polyisocyanurate insulation board installed across the full 25,000 sq ft deck. TPO membrane mechanically fastened and heat-welded at all seams. All HVAC penetrations flashed and sealed. Project completed in 7 calendar days with zero disruption to building operations.
